Empowering Education with AI

Voice to
Knowledge.

Transform your lectures, meetings, and ideas into structured notes, interactive Q&A sessions, and high-quality mind maps instantly.

Processing Audio...

"...so the fundamental difference between these two theories lies in their approach to..."

Crystal Clear Record

Capture every word with our high-fidelity web recording engine, optimized for long sessions.

Instant Transcription

Powered by Groq-Whisper for near-instant results. Support for multi-lingual detection.

Semantic Learning

AI extracts key insights, generates summaries, and creates interactive Q&A for testing.

How it works

From recording to structured knowledge in under a minute.

01

Record or Upload

Use your microphone directly in the browser, or upload an existing audio file from your phone.

02

AI Transcribes

Groq Whisper converts your speech to text in seconds with high accuracy — even in Indonesian.

03

Learn & Export

Get a clean summary, interactive Q&A, and export your notes to PDF or share with friends.

Simple, transparent pricing

Start for free, upgrade when you need more power to unlock advanced features.

Basic

$0/forever
  • 3 Transcriptions per month
  • Basic Summaries
  • Standard Support
Get Started
Most Popular

Pro

$15/month
  • Unlimited Transcriptions
  • Advanced AI Mind Maps
  • Custom AI Voices
  • Export to PDF/Word

Academic

$8/month
  • Requires .edu email
  • All Pro features included
